channel.title: SPL - Central Library
channel.description: Upcoming events for SPL - Central Library

item.title: Collection Spotlight Exhibit
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Event details

item.title: Spring Quarter Registration for Free English (ESOL) Classes
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 10:30 AM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Join us to take a placement test for the Spring Quarter of English classes.

Event details

item.title: Free Tax Help
item.description:
Wednesday, March 18, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 5 - Mixing Chamber Meeting Room

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

This exhibit highlights the diversity and depth of The Seattle Public Library’s collection, composed of over two million items.

Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 12:30 PM

Trained volunteers will be available to answer questions and prepare personal tax returns.

Event details

item.title: Queer Silent Book Club Seattle
item.description:
Thursday, March 19, 2026 at 6 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 3 - Living Room

Queer folks and allies: join us for silent reading and bookish chit-chat with Queer Silent Book Club Seattle!

Event details

item.title: Browse: Wander the Central Library
item.description:
Sunday, March 22, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 8 - Gallery

Join artist in residence Nina Vichayapai for this guided walk through each of the Library’s floors.

item.title: AWS Certified AI Practitioner – Exam Prep
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 1 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 3

In this AI foundational 6-part series, you will learn fundamental concepts and terminology related to artificial intelligence, machine learning, deep learning, and generative AI.

Event details

item.title: KUOW Book Talks with Sasha taqwšəblu LaPointe
item.description:
Monday, March 23, 2026 at 6:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 1 - Auditorium

Join us for a Book Club talk with author Sasha taqwšəblu LaPointe.

item.title: Online Job Applications
item.description:
Tuesday, March 24, 2026 at 1:30 PM

Location: Central Library, Level 4 - Room 2

Discover how to effectively search for jobs, complete online applications, and ensure your submissions stand out.
